name: Kids' Wall Shelf White with Gold - Pillowfort™: Floating Decorative MDF Wall Organizer, 24" Wide
description: Decorate your kid's space with the Wall Shelf from Pillowfort™. This white wall shelf is designed in a rectangle shape with a gold-tone metal bar for an appealing contrast that blends well with their existing decor. Made with wood, this wall shelf offers ample space for plants, books and other decorative items.
